title: Anenji ANJ-4000W-24V runtime support archive
summary: Private support archive for the issue #9 device. The runtime selected modbus_smg/models/anenji_4200_protocol_1.json, matched layout 1 and model code 13569 with rated power 4200, and reported live telemetry values. Control learning did not run because cloud login preflight failed for this account.
